entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`pk` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `creationTimestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `coverImagePath` TEXT NOT NULL, `folderId` TEXT, `deletionTimestamp` INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(`folderId`) REFERENCES `folders`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL )

indices.name: index_documents_id
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_documents_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id`)

indices.name: index_documents_folderId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_documents_folderId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`folderId`)

indices.name: index_documents_creationTimestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_documents_creationTimestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`creationTimestamp`)

indices.name: index_documents_folderId_creationTimestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_documents_folderId_creationTimestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`folderId`, `creationTimestamp`)

indices.name: index_documents_title
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_documents_title` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`title`)

indices.name: index_documents_deletionTimestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_documents_deletionTimestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`deletionTimestamp`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `documentOwnerId` TEXT NOT NULL, `pageNumber` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sourceImagePath` TEXT NOT NULL, `processedImagePath` TEXT NOT NULL, `thumbnailPath` TEXT NOT NULL, `position` INTEGER NOT NULL, `extractedText` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`documentOwnerId`) REFERENCES `documents`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_pages_documentOwnerId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_pages_documentOwnerId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`documentOwnerId`)

indices.name: index_pages_documentOwnerId_position
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_pages_documentOwnerId_position` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`documentOwnerId`, `position`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `creationTimestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, tokenize=unicode61, content=`documents`, prefix=`2,3,4`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_documents_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `documents` BEGIN DELETE FROM `documents_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_documents_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `documents` BEGIN DELETE FROM `documents_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_documents_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `documents` BEGIN INSERT INTO `documents_fts`(`docid`, `title`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`); END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_documents_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `documents` BEGIN INSERT INTO `documents_fts`(`docid`, `title`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
